data.title: If You Invested $1000 In This Stock 10 Years Ago, You Would Have $19,000 Today
Barrick Sees Stable Gold Output In Q3, Prepares For Stronger Q4
data.description: Barrick Gold reports preliminary Q3 production results with 943,000 oz gold and 48,000 tonnes copper, aiming for full-year guidance.

data.title: Trump To Ask 'Would You Like Fries With That?': McDonald's Fry Cook Stint Included In Swing State Campaign Stop
data.description: Donald Trump is putting his love of McDonald's to the test with a campaign stop seeing him cook some french fries in a key swing state.

data.title: This Cisco Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Wednesday
Plants Vs. Zombies 3 Servers Shut Down As EA Plans 'Major Overhaul'
data.description: Plants vs. Zombies 3 has been pulled offline for a major overhaul. EA plans to reset player progress and relaunch with new updates.
